summary: Iran launched missiles at several Gulf states including Bahrain and Kuwait overnight; in response, the US struck Iranian targets near Qeshm Island. Hezbollah fired rockets at Kiryat Shmona and Misgav Am in northern Israel, with Israeli air defenses intercepting the projectiles. The IDF Chief of Staff stated there is no ceasefire for Israeli forces in Lebanon and that the military is prepared to immediately return to combat against Iran.
key_points: Iran launched missiles at Gulf states including Bahrain and Kuwait overnight; the US responded by striking Iranian targets in the Qeshm Island area. (Source: @pkpoi/142395)
Hezbollah fired rockets at Kiryat Shmona and Misgav Am from Lebanon; Israeli air defenses intercepted the projectiles with no injuries reported. (Source: @manniefabian/58389)

IDF Chief of Staff Lt. Gen. Eyal Zamir stated there is no ceasefire for Israeli forces in Lebanon and the military is prepared to immediately return to combat against Iran. (Source: @almogboker78/17299)
Bahrain closed its airspace to all traffic from 03:30 to 16:00 UTC with only limited pre-approved departures permitted. (Source: @Faytuks_Network/3292)
Kuwait's defense forces reported intercepting 13 ballistic missiles and 17 drones coming from Iran. (Source: @naya_foriraq/76899)
IDF carried out a strike on a vehicle south of Beirut and conducted multiple targeted strikes on vehicles across southern Lebanon. (Source: @inon_yttach/8544)

Iranian Foreign Minister Araghchi stated Iranian armed forces are conducting self-defense operations against sites used by the US to attack civilian vessels and violate the ceasefire. (Source: @N12chat/210760)
An explosion was reported in the area of Bandar Abbas and Qeshm Island, with local sources describing a loud blast and shaking from the direction of the airport. (Source: @mamlekate/103611)

sections.executive_summary: Iran launched missiles at multiple Gulf states including Bahrain and Kuwait overnight, prompting a US retaliatory strike on Iranian targets near Qeshm Island. Hezbollah continued its attacks on northern Israel with rocket fire at Kiryat Shmona and Misgav Am, all intercepted by Israeli air defenses. The IDF Chief of Staff declared there is no ceasefire for Israeli forces in Lebanon and affirmed readiness to immediately return to full-scale combat against Iran.

points: Iran launched missiles targeting several Gulf states including Bahrain and Kuwait overnight, marking a significant escalation in the regional conflict. (Source: @pkpoi/142395)
Kuwait's Ministry of Defense confirmed it intercepted 13 ballistic missiles and 17 drones originating from Iran. (Source: @naya_foriraq/76899)
An explosion was reported in Bandar Abbas on 13 Khordad at 13:45 local time, with residents describing a loud blast and shaking from the direction of the airport. (Source: @mamlekate/103611)
An unconfirmed report indicated an explosion in the village of Nakhl Gol on Qeshm Island, with Mehr News Agency also reporting explosions in the Qeshm county area. (Source: @VahidOnline/75883)

Iranian Foreign Minister Araghchi stated that Iranian armed forces are conducting self-defense operations against sites used by the US to attack civilian ships and violate the ceasefire, warning any hostile action will receive an immediate and firm response. (Source: @N12chat/210760)

Iran's Ambassador to Russia Kazem Jalali confirmed that former SNSC Secretary Ali Larijani made approximately seven secret trips to Moscow over a year and a half, with only two being made public. (Source: @VahidOnline/75908)
US Secretary of State Marco Rubio stated that Iranian missile launch platforms have suffered severe damage leading to significant degradation of their capabilities. (Source: @naya_foriraq/76902)

IDF Chief of Staff Lt. Gen. Eyal Zamir visited the Haifa Naval Base and declared that in Lebanon there is no ceasefire for Israeli forces, stating the military will maximize freedom of action and seize every opportunity to remove threats to Israeli citizens and forces. (Source: @manniefabian/58391)

Zamir stated the Israeli Navy is being strengthened as an additional long-range strategic arm and that the IDF across all branches is prepared to immediately return to combat against the Iranian terror regime. (Source: @manniefabian/58391)

The IDF intercepted a suspicious aerial target that crossed from Lebanon into Israeli airspace in the Manara and Kiryat Shmona area; rocket alerts were activated due to concerns about interceptor debris falling. (Source: @New_security8200/200911)
Two rockets launched by Hezbollah at Misgav Am were intercepted by air defenses with no injuries reported. (Source: @manniefabian/58389)
The IDF struck a vehicle south of Beirut and carried out multiple targeted strikes on vehicles across southern Lebanon throughout the morning. (Source: @inon_yttach/8544)
The IDF also struck a Lebanese Army vehicle in the Dir Zahrani area according to reports from Lebanon. (Source: @inon_yttach/8542)

Brig. Gen. Yisrael Shomer, chief of the Operations Division, requested immediate retirement from the IDF for personal circumstances; he is reportedly suspected of moral offenses and was questioned by Military Police. (Source: @manniefabian/58384)
No specific operational developments regarding Gaza or the West Bank were reported in the provided messages.
Hezbollah launched rockets from Lebanon at Kiryat Shmona and Misgav Am in northern Israel; Israeli air defenses intercepted the projectiles. (Source: @manniefabian/58387)
The IDF conducted a strike on a vehicle south of Beirut and multiple targeted strikes on vehicles across southern Lebanon. (Source: @inon_yttach/8544)
The IDF struck a Lebanese Army vehicle in the Dir Zahrani area. (Source: @inon_yttach/8542)

IDF Arabic-language spokesman Avichay Adraee issued an urgent warning to residents of Lebanon, specifically the residents of Kharayeb, stating the IDF is forced to act forcefully against Hezbollah for violating the ceasefire agreement. (Source: @shin_persian/6461)

The Islamic Resistance in Iraq released thermal imaging footage from June 2, 2026, showing an operation targeting a gathering of Israeli enemy soldiers on the southern outskirts of Zoutar al-Sharqiya in southern Lebanon using Ababil attack drones. (Source: @naya_foriraq/76901)

Israeli Ambassador to the US Yechiel Leiter condemned Hezbollah's morning rocket attack on Kiryat Shmona as another blatant violation of the understanding, noting Israel had agreed not to strike Hezbollah command centers in Beirut on the condition that Hezbollah stop attacking Israeli towns. (Source: @almogboker78/17298)

The Islamic Resistance in Iraq issued a statement regarding the Coordination Framework's call to Islamic Resistance factions about the issue of restricting weapons to the state, emphasizing that any national project for weapons restriction must be accompanied by genuine steps guaranteeing Iraq's sovereignty. (Source: @naya_foriraq/76910)
Bahrain completely closed its airspace to all air traffic from 03:30 UTC to 16:00 UTC, permitting only limited pre-approved departures. (Source: @Faytuks_Network/3292)
Kuwait's Ministry of Defense reported intercepting 13 ballistic missiles and 17 drones coming from Iran. (Source: @naya_foriraq/76899)
Iran launched missiles at several Gulf states including Bahrain and Kuwait overnight, to which the US responded by striking Iranian targets in the Qeshm Island area. (Source: @pkpoi/142395)

key_developments: Iran launched missiles at multiple Gulf states including Bahrain and Kuwait overnight, prompting the US to conduct retaliatory strikes on Iranian targets near Qeshm Island, with the exchange not leading to further escalation beyond these actions. (Source: @pkpoi/142395)

Hezbollah fired rockets from Lebanon at Kiryat Shmona and Misgav Am in northern Israel; Israeli air defenses intercepted the projectiles and no injuries were reported in either attack. (Source: @manniefabian/58389)

IDF Chief of Staff Lt. Gen. Eyal Zamir declared at the Haifa Naval Base that there is no ceasefire for Israeli forces in Lebanon, the Navy is being strengthened as a strategic long-range arm, and the IDF is prepared to immediately return to combat against Iran. (Source: @manniefabian/58391)

Kuwait's Ministry of Defense confirmed it intercepted 13 ballistic missiles and 17 drones originating from Iran, while Bahrain closed its entire airspace from 03:30 to 16:00 UTC with only limited pre-approved departures permitted. (Source: @naya_foriraq/76899)

The IDF conducted multiple strikes in Lebanon including a vehicle strike south of Beirut, targeted strikes on vehicles across southern Lebanon, and a strike on a Lebanese Army vehicle in the Dir Zahrani area. (Source: @inon_yttach/8544)

An explosion was reported in Bandar Abbas near the airport and on Qeshm Island, with local sources describing loud blasts and shaking; the US subsequently struck targets in the Qeshm Island area in response to Iranian missile launches. (Source: @mamlekate/103611)

Iranian Foreign Minister Araghchi stated Iranian forces are conducting self-defense operations against US sites used to attack civilian vessels, warning any hostile action will receive an immediate and firm response, while Rubio confirmed severe damage to Iranian missile launch platforms. (Source: @N12chat/210760)
sections.threat_assessment: The threat level across the region is significantly elevated following Iran's overnight missile strikes on Gulf states and the subsequent US retaliatory strike near Qeshm Island, indicating a widening of the conflict beyond the Israel-Lebanon-Hezbollah axis. Hezbollah continues to challenge the ceasefire understanding by launching rockets at northern Israeli communities, while the IDF has signaled an aggressive posture with Chief of Staff Zamir declaring no ceasefire applies to Israeli forces in Lebanon. The interception of 13 ballistic missiles and 17 drones by Kuwait, along with Bahrain's airspace closure, demonstrates the direct threat to Gulf state sovereignty and the potential for further Iranian escalation. The Israeli Navy's expansion as a strategic long-range arm suggests preparations for potential extended operations against Iranian targets at greater distances.
sections.regional_response: The US demonstrated direct military involvement by striking Iranian targets near Qeshm Island in response to Iran's missile attacks on Gulf allies, signaling continued commitment to Gulf state defense. Bahrain responded defensively by closing its entire airspace, while Kuwait's defense forces actively engaged incoming Iranian projectiles. Iran's Foreign Minister framed Iranian actions as self-defense against US violations of the ceasefire, attempting to justify continued military operations diplomatically. The Islamic Resistance in Iraq signaled conditional openness to national dialogue on weapons restriction but tied it to Iraqi sovereignty guarantees, indicating internal political tensions within the Axis of Resistance.
sections.intelligence_notes: The sudden retirement of Brig. Gen. Yisrael Shomer, head of the IDF Operations Division, under investigation for moral offenses, represents a significant command disruption at a critical operational moment, with a colonel from the Planning Department serving as interim replacement. The concentration of explosions reported on Qeshm Island and Bandar Abbas—a major Iranian naval and commercial hub—coupled with the US retaliatory strike in the Qeshm area, suggests this zone is a focal point of current operations. Iranian Ambassador Jalali's disclosure of approximately seven secret trips by former SNSC Secretary Larijani to Moscow over 18 months indicates sustained back-channel Iran-Russia diplomatic engagement that has been largely hidden from public view, with potential implications for military and strategic coordination.
